title: Python CPU Benchmark
summary: A cross-architecture CPU benchmark tool written in pure Python measuring single/multi-threaded compute performance.
description: This cross-architecture CPU benchmark utility evaluates single-threaded and multi-threaded performance through math-heavy High-Performance Computing workloads. It targets diverse architectures, including AMD64, AArch64, and RISC-V, and outputs structured JSON data suitable for cross-run and cross-architecture comparisons. Built in pure Python, it relies on workloads like dense matrix multiplications, FFT, numerical integrations, and optional solvers.
highlights: Evaluates math-heavy continuous computations (FFT, Monte Carlo, Math integrations)
Offers structured JSON output for easy chart plotting and cross-platform analysis
Works gracefully across a huge array of targets including QEMU emulated devices
